title: To the Not Impossible Him
content:
How shall I know, unless I go
        To Cairo and Cathay,
    Whether or not this blessed spot
        Is blest in every way?

    Now it may be, the flower for me
        Is this beneath my nose;
    How shall I tell, unless I smell
        The Carthaginian rose?

    The fabric of my faithful love
        No power shall dim or ravel
    Whilst I stay here,--but oh, my dear,
        If I should ever travel!
meaning:
"To the Not Impossible Him" is a quintessential example of Edna St. Vincent Millay's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
